changelog: FIX (DEV ONLY): Hero title no longer clips long team names. Two changes: (1) backend + client now use SHORT team names (e.g. 'White Sox @ Angels' instead of 'Chicago White Sox @ Los Angeles Angels'); (2) hero title font reduced from 56sp to 44sp with matching line height. Verified: every active matchup fits cleanly on 1-2 lines on 1080p TV at the standard 96dp side padding.
